title: fix(deps): update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.9.6

[Compare Source](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.9.5...v2.9.6)

#### 2.9.6

##### Fixes

-   fix: create parent directory before report files ([#​1212](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1212)) \[[`0ac65de`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/0ac65de)]

##### Maintenance

-   Bump github.com/onsi/gomega from 1.27.6 to 1.27.7 ([#​1202](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1202)) \[[`3e39231`](https://togithub.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/3e39231)]

</details>
